```instructions
# GitHub Copilot Config Compatibility Shim

This file is intentionally minimal.

## Canonical Doctrine (Authoritative)
- `AGENTS.md`
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/COPILOT_INSTRUCTIONS_CONFIG.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/FILE_PRESERVATION_MANDATE.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/NuSyQ-Hub_INSTRUCTIONS.instructions.md`

## Consolidation Draft (Non-Authoritative)
- `.github/instructions/UNIFIED_COPILOT_CONFIGURATION.md`

## Notes
- Do not treat this file as a standalone rule set.
- Keep this shim to preserve legacy references and avoid broken links.
```
